title: Extract proposal artifact list support from review workspace
summary: Modularize the macOS review/navigation workspace by extracting proposal artifact list, filter, selection, and recovery support into a focused native source file.
acceptance_criteria: StudioMacProposalArtifactSection and closely related artifact recovery/list support move out of StudioMacReviewNavigationWorkspace.swift into a dedicated macOS source file.
The extracted code preserves current filtering, selection, and artifact focus behavior without changing product semantics.
The review workspace file becomes meaningfully smaller and ownership around proposal artifact list surfaces becomes clearer.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal artifact list, filters, selection synchronization, and recovery card now live in `StudioMacReviewNavigationProposalArtifactList.swift` instead of staying embedded in the main review workspace file.
The extraction preserved artifact filtering and selection behavior while reducing `StudioMacReviewNavigationWorkspace.swift` to a substantially smaller owner surface.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the proposal artifact list modularization.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after the extraction.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0029: extract proposal artifact list/filter/focus workflow into another dedicated macOS support file.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep the slice centered on artifact list/filter/recovery support rather than mixing in the full proposal workspace dashboard.
Preserve existing selection synchronization and filter semantics.
